heading: Definitions

children.heading: Group health plan
children.label: 1 Group health plan
children.text: The term “group health plan” has the meaning given such term in 5000(b) of title 26. Such term shall not include any plan substantially all of the coverage under which is for qualified long-term care services (as defined in ). Such term shall not include any qualified small employer health reimbursement arrangement (as defined in ).1section 7702B(c) of title 26section 9831(d)(2) of title 26So in original. Probably should be preceded by “section”.1

children.heading: Covered employee
children.label: 2 Covered employee
children.text: The term “covered employee” means an individual who is (or was) provided coverage under a group health plan by virtue of the performance of services by the individual for 1 or more persons maintaining the plan (including as an employee defined in ).section 401(c)(1) of title 26

children.label: i
children.text: as the spouse of the covered employee, or

children.label: ii
children.text: as the dependent child of the employee.

children.heading: Special rule for terminations and reduced employment
children.label: B Special rule for terminations and reduced employment
children.text: In the case of a qualifying event described in , the term “qualified beneficiary” includes the covered employee.section 300bb–3(2) of this title

children.heading: Plan administrator
children.label: 4 Plan administrator
children.text: The term “plan administrator” has the meaning given the term “administrator” by .section 1002(16)(A) of title 29
